rationale: In the citing paper, Rao and Wang (2017) appears only in a grouped literature-review citation under the broad category of work on false claims and deceptive practices. The text does not discuss that paper's specific findings, mechanisms, data, or methods, and it is not used to build the empirical design or identify the event-study strategy. This indicates a background-positioning role rather than a distinct, paper-specific contribution to the citing paper's argument.
